description_long: This object is a modern, industrial-style sewing machine with a robust, angular frame constructed primarily from dark metal and plastic. The body features a matte black and metallic silver finish, with two large, textured dials on the right side for adjusting settings. The sewing area is spacious, with a flat metal plate and a visible needle mechanism, while the left side houses a small metallic panel and a thread guide. The top of the machine has a recessed area, possibly for threading or maintenance access, and the overall design is sleek and utilitarian. The machine's base is wide and stable, supporting the entire structure and providing a solid platform for fabric manipulation. Subtle wear and metallic accents suggest durability and frequent use in an urban or workshop environment.
description: A robust, angular sewing machine with a matte black and metallic silver finish, featuring large adjustment dials and a spacious sewing area. Its industrial design and sturdy base make it suitable for heavy-duty urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the main sewing area, two large adjustment dials, and a metallic plate under the needle.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the handwheel and the machine's angular, metallic back panel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the sewing area, a smaller metallic panel, and the thread guide.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the needle area and the wide, stable base of the machine.
attribute_brand_logo: A small metallic plaque with unreadable text is visible on the upper left and right sides of the machine body.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two large dials on the right side, possibly for stitch selection and tension adjustment; no digital screens or additional buttons visible.
attribute_stitch_selector_dial: Two large, round dials with textured edges and visible markings are present on the right side; likely one is a stitch selector dial.
